scenarios.name: Community Pulse becomes visible after page load
Community Pulse sits between garden viz and main content
Section exposes the expected heading (Community Pulse)
Section has aria-labelledby pointing to pulse-heading
Section stays hidden when recentReactions is empty
Renders five emoji badges in shipped order
Sprout badge shows aggregated count of 24
Fire badge shows aggregated count of 13
Thinking badge shows aggregated count of 13
Heart badge shows aggregated count of 16
Rocket badge shows aggregated count of 18
Only Sprout badge (highest at 24) has gold highlight
Highlight border uses --color-accent-gold token
Most-reacted day callout shows correct title from manifest
Most-reacted day shows 55 reactions
Most-reacted day link points to correct day URL
Each badge has aria-label with reaction name and count
Sprout badge has aria-label: Sprout reactions: 24
Fire badge has aria-label: Fire reactions: 13
Thinking badge has aria-label: Thinking reactions: 13
Heart badge has aria-label: Heart reactions: 16
Rocket badge has aria-label: Rocket reactions: 18
CTA link is visible and points to #todays-change
CTA link contains text about reacting to today's feature
Mobile: badges wrap and resize at 639px breakpoint
Mobile: no horizontal scrollbar at 375px viewport
Design system: all CSS uses design-system tokens with no hardcoded colors
